* **IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements**

## Library: IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-03-03 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD2DTHepatitisAEncounterElements |

 
This library defines encounter-based elements for Hepatitis A used throughout the Immunization CPG
